description: 184 - 14-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Pat McFadden (former Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster and Minister for Intergovernmental Relations)
text:
Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster and Minister for Intergovernmental Relations)

Subject: Re: FW: Letter from America

From: Pat Mcfadden < Personal >
Date: 14/04/2025, 22:11
To: Peter Mandelson < Personal =|

Very helpful. Thank you.

On Mon, 14 Apr 2025 at 22:00, Peter Mandelson < Personal > wrote:

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Fyi

| send these weekly to David Lammy and some in No10

Lord Mandelson
HM Ambassador, Washington DC

Personal | Personal

From: Peter Mandelson

< Personal >
